div.div: SVID Lifecycle: 1️⃣ Workload starts → 2️⃣ SPIRE Agent attests (Docker labels + image SHA) → 3️⃣ SPIRE Server issues X.509 SVID → 4️⃣ py-spiffe exposes TLS identity → 5️⃣ mTLS established → 6️⃣ SVID auto-rotates before expiry

switch.text: SVID Lifecycle: 1️⃣ Workload starts → 2️⃣ SPIRE Agent attests (Docker labels + image SHA) → 3️⃣ SPIRE Server issues X.509 SVID → 4️⃣ py-spiffe exposes TLS identity → 5️⃣ mTLS established → 6️⃣ SVID auto-rotates before expiry
